intro: You just scanned a QR at the property. Choose how you want to open the guest menu and services.
howWebMenuDesc: opens the in-room menu and services directly in your browser.
howWhatsAppDesc: opens a chat with a pre-filled link to this property's menu. You can pin/save that chat for quick access.
liveBookingNote: If you have a live booking, your link may include your stay code so that requests automatically reach the right room.
waMessage: Hello, I'd like to see the menu for {{hotel}}.

errors.loadFailed: We couldn't load full property details — you can still open the menu below.
errors.noContext: We couldn't detect which property this QR belongs to. Please scan the VAiyu QR at your hotel (or ask the front desk) and try again.
errors.noMenuLink: We can't build a menu link because this page doesn't include a hotel or stay code. Please scan the VAiyu QR at the property again.
